notes: v368 — builds on v367 with four fixes; all the v367 work (the auto-pilot deep audit, the 🌏 regime gate / 🎲 risk sizing / 🧊 cooldown, and your portfolio tools) is unchanged. (1) 🤖 AUTOBUY FIX: the auto-pilot now waits until the day's signals are FULLY prepared before it runs, instead of acting on a half-loaded list and then skipping the rest of the day — this is the fix for 'autobuy keeps finding nothing'. And a manual '▶ Run now' test no longer uses up the day's automatic run. (2) The Strength /10 signal scores are smoothed at the very bottom of the scale — a tiny edge no longer scores below a zero edge. (3) ↩ Undo and 🗑 Delete now always land on the exact trade you clicked, even if a share was sold in two parts on different days. (4) Smoother scrolling on the big share list in the light theme. Nothing about your balances or holdings changed. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load v368.
